translation: In Your name, O Allah, I die and I live (said when going to sleep).
O Allah, in Your name I die and I live (another common short form used at bedtime).

arabic: Allahumma inni aslamtu nafsi ilayk, wa fawwadtu amri ilayk, wa alja'tu zahri ilayk, raghbatan wa rahbatan ilayk, la malja'a wa la manja minka illa ilayk, amantu bikitabikalladhi anzalta wa nabiyyika allathee arsalta
translation: O Allah, I submit my soul to You, entrust my affair to You, turn my face toward You, desiring Your pleasure and fearing Your punishment. There is no refuge or escape from You except to You. I believe in Your Book which You revealed and in Your Prophet whom You sent.

arabic: Bismillahi wadha'tu janbi wa bika arfa'uh, fa in amsakta nafsi faghfir laha, wa in arsaltaha fahfazha bima tahfazu bihi 'ibadakas-salihun
translation: In the name of Allah I lay my side down and in Your name I raise it. If You take my soul then forgive it, and if You return it then protect it by the protection You grant to Your righteous servants.
O Allah, protect me from Your punishment on the Day You resurrect Your servants.
Glory is to Allah and praise is to Him (often said many times as remembrance).

arabic: A'udhu bikalimatillahi tammati min sharri ma khalaq
translation: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He created.

arabic: Allahumma rabba as-samawatis-sab'i wa rabba al-'arshil-'azim, rabbi fala ta'khidhni bi dhanbi, ighfir li innaka anta al-ghafoorur-rahim
translation: O Allah, Lord of the seven heavens and Lord of the Mighty Throne, my Lord, do not take me to task for my sin; forgive me — indeed You are the Oft-Forgiving, Most Merciful.

arabic: Allahumma inni a'udhu bi ridak minka min sakhatika wa a'udhu bika min 'uqbatika, wa a'udhu bika min ni'matika laka 'alayya, wa a'udhu bika min 'afwa laka 'ani
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in Your pleasure from Your anger, and I seek refuge in You from Your punishment, and I seek refuge in You from being ungrateful for Your favors, and I seek refuge in You from being far from Your pardon.
Recite Ayatul Kursi before sleeping — one who recites it will be protected throughout the night by an angel appointed for him.

arabic: Qul Huwa Allahu Ahad; Qul A'udhu bi Rabbil-Falaq; Qul A'udhu bi Rabbil-Nas
translation: Recite Surah Al-Ikhlas, Surah Al-Falaq, and Surah An-Nas, then blow and wipe over your body; these provide protection when recited before sleep.
